name: NIJAN ADHIKARI
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building and maintaining scalable web and mobile applications across the full development lifecycle. Proficient in JavaScript, C, C++, React, and the MERN stack, with exposure to cloud architecture, third-party API integration, and codebase security auditing. Experienced in agile, results-oriented development cycles with a strong focus on problem-solving, code quality, and reliable delivery. Currently pursuing dual degrees in Computer Science and Management Information Systems.

experience.title: Website Content & Maintenance Developer
bullets: Developed and deployed feature updates for the official school web platform, improving functionality and user experience for students and faculty.
Collaborated cross-functionally with administrative departments to validate content accuracy and implement new features, reducing information discrepancies by an estimated 25%.
Diagnosed and resolved critical bugs in the production environment, maintaining platform stability, performance, and reliability.
Maintained technical documentation to support ongoing development and institutional knowledge transfer.

experience.title: Co-founder & Full Stack Developer
bullets: Engineered and launched multiple full-stack web and mobile applications, owning all technical operations from requirement gathering to production deployment.
Implemented scalable cloud architectures supporting both media production workflows and application backends, ensuring system reliability and performance.
Led client-facing technical discussions to align product roadmaps with business objectives and delivery timelines.
Maintained comprehensive technical documentation and contributed to iterative development cycles.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Developed a scalable logistics management web application using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js), delivering a robust platform for core business operations.
Integrated third-party APIs for payment gateways and real-time location tracking, expanding core application functionality.
Audited and refactored the existing codebase to resolve security vulnerabilities and improve overall system performance by 20%.
Wrote reliable, efficient code while maintaining version control practices throughout the development lifecycle.

experience.title: Lead Frontend Developer
bullets: Led the full development lifecycle for over 10 successful client projects, from planning and technical specification through to final delivery.
Architected and implemented a component-based frontend architecture using modern JavaScript frameworks, reducing feature development time by 30%.
Engineered key CRM features that improved customer engagement metrics and streamlined internal business workflows.
Participated in product roadmap planning and contributed to technical specification reviews to ensure quality outputs in results-oriented cycles.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science & Information Technology

projects.name: Leadger – Ethical Finance App (SFU StormHacks 2025)
projects.description: Architected and developed the backend infrastructure and AI integration for a privacy-first ethical finance application during a 24-hour hackathon. Engineered core functionality by integrating the Gemini API to analyze spending habits against ethical metrics and provide personalized, sustainable alternatives. Utilized Firebase for secure data management and real-time functionality.
